notes: Mock-serious heartbreak over literal orange chicken. The song escalates from sad R&B into total meltdown: 'I need my chicken, I need my chicken, I need my chicken!' then 'ORANGE CHICKEN! ORANGE CHICKEN! ORANGE CHICKEN!' in full caps. The 'Shooby-dooby' moment is the doowop break. Play it warm and absurd — amber throughout, with the final escalation being the biggest key moment on the album.

chunks.note: My orange chicken's gone — opening lament, straight-faced
Shooby-dooby-dooby-doo-wop — the doowop break, one word one moment
Shimmy-shimmy-shimmy-shimmy-bop — companion, one word one moment
I need my chicken #1 — escalation pt1
I need my chicken! #3 — peak escalation
ORANGE CHICKEN! #3 — the absolute peak, final cry
